image:image.image:title: Exhibit 01: evidence image 01 — Solscan transaction screenshot showing transfer from KuCoin Hot
image:image.image:caption: evidence image 01 — Solscan transaction screenshot showing transfer from KuCoin Hot Wallet 2 to a Binance-labeled deposit address for 1,365.999 SOL.

image:image.image:title: Exhibit 02: evidence image 02 — Telegram conversation screenshot where Soldrift states he does not
image:image.image:caption: evidence image 02 — Telegram conversation screenshot where Soldrift states he does not use KuCoin and only uses Binance.

image:image.image:title: Exhibit 03: evidence image 03 — Telegram conversation screenshot showing wallet-flow question and
image:image.image:caption: evidence image 03 — Telegram conversation screenshot showing wallet-flow question and Soldrift response ok ok.

image:image.image:title: Exhibit 04: evidence image 04 — Solscan transaction detail showing a RENDER transfer involving wallet
image:image.image:caption: evidence image 04 — Solscan transaction detail showing a RENDER transfer involving wallet 42nh and KuCoin Hot Wallet 2, with Efw wallet-flow lead displayed in signer area. — soldrift scam warning, phishing f...

image:image.image:title: Exhibit 05: evidence image 05 — Solscan transfer table showing multi-token routing involving Binance
image:image.image:caption: evidence image 05 — Solscan transfer table showing multi-token routing involving Binance 2, Kraken Hot Wallet, wallet 42nh, KuCoin Hot Wallet 2, RENDER, USDT and SOL. — soldrift scam warning, phishing fraud...

image:image.image:title: Exhibit 06: evidence image 06 — Solscan transaction showing Binance 2 transferring 2,308.005358 SOL
image:image.image:caption: evidence image 06 — Solscan transaction showing Binance 2 transferring 2,308.005358 SOL to three accounts including 2,293 SOL to 42nh wallet.

image:image.image:title: Exhibit 07: evidence image 07 — Solscan transaction showing 42nh wallet transferring 2,293 SOL to
image:image.image:caption: evidence image 07 — Solscan transaction showing 42nh wallet transferring 2,293 SOL to KuCoin Hot Wallet 2 with Efw and 42nh in signer field.

image:image.image:title: Exhibit 08: evidence image 08 — Marked Solscan transaction showing 42nh wallet transferring 2,293 SOL
image:image.image:caption: evidence image 08 — Marked Solscan transaction showing 42nh wallet transferring 2,293 SOL to KuCoin Hot Wallet 2 and Efw signer overlap.

image:image.image:title: Exhibit 09: evidence image 09 — Solscan wallet page for 42nh wallet showing KuCoin exchange deposit
image:image.image:caption: evidence image 09 — Solscan wallet page for 42nh wallet showing KuCoin exchange deposit address tags and high value transfers with Binance 2 and Efw.

image:image.image:title: Exhibit 10: evidence image 10 — Solscan transfer table continuation showing 42nh wallet high value
image:image.image:caption: evidence image 10 — Solscan transfer table continuation showing 42nh wallet high value transfers involving Binance 2 Coinbase Hot Wallet 2 and Bybit Wallet 14.
